Arachne Review (Morimens) : Role Divine Ultra

Must Pull? 
: Yes / No

•You need understand one hit skill (Eternal Loom) can be ko'ed enemy in one, but u need understand her pursuit mechanics, so after 5 leap card it trigger ultra round.
You must use her ult to trigger her pursuit (Warning: Use it on Extra turn or the pursuit will no be triggered). 

• Did you have at least 1 (one) stack of 'Weaver'?
If not, your Arachne could not trigger pursuit due to not having stacks, similar to Vortice's pursuit. 'Weaver' can be acquired through
playing Arachne's 1-cost, then the O-cost card created from that.

• Were you in Ultra Round/Did you Annihilate?
If not, then you failed to meet one of her pursuit requirements, please try again while within one of those two conditions

• Was her exalt used AFTER triggering Annihilation/entering Ultra Round?
If you used your Exalt before triggering those, you also failed to meet the prerequisite condition for Arachne's pursuit, please try
reversing the order of operations there

• Did you play a DIFFERENT character's command card after all of the above were completed?
If you only played Arachne's command cards after, then your pursuit wouldn't have triggered, considering she only pursuits if another
character's command card is played, not her own

Souce: Someone at Main discord. 

Team: Really Heavy On Alinemus like Thais, Winkle but she really flexible. 

Wheel Of Destiny: WoD Signature and SR signature, Uteria Somnia ( Gmurphy Wod),  Incalculable Factor (Winkle) 

Covenant: Dream Of Medicine (Dps, yes she can be dps), Rabbit cove i forgot the name (Defense)

This Character very Complex for beginner. And it's ultra
